ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., Business, Individual) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the account */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number assigned to the account */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the account */,
  "annual_revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue associated with the account */,
  "oracle_id" TEXT /* Reference to the Oracle ID related to the account */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the account */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the account */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the account */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the account */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the account */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the account belongs to */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the account */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the account */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the account was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated account */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Full name of the contact person */,
  "contact_role" TEXT /* Role of the contact within the organization */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the contact */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the contact */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the contact */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the contact */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the contact */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the contact */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the contact was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the contact */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the contact was last modified */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contact is the primary contact for the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_analytics" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated account */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the period */,
  "sales_rep" TEXT /* Sales representative responsible for the account */,
  "date_period" TEXT /* Time period for the sales data (e.g., Q1 2023) */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., Corporate, Individual) */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel used (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the sales record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the sales record was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the sales record */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the sales record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_analytics_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_analytics_sales_rep FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated account */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made to the account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Previous value before change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_logs_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, support) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related account */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., account_update, new_contact) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message related to the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration_logs" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration event */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated account */,
  "integration_status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date the integration occurred */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., Oracle, Salesforce) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the integration */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message related to the integration event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_logs_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the account type (e.g., Corporate, Individual) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the account type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the account type is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the account type was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the account type was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated account */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., revenue_change, contact_added) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Previous value before change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "is_revertible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the change can be reverted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_history_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_notifications" (
  "email_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the email was sent */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related account */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the email */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body content of the email */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the email was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the email (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "retry_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the email was retried */,
  "send_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts to send the email */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("email_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_notifications_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)
